mapper.select: select * from flight_info order by departure_time desc
mapper.insert:
select coalesce(max(id), 0) + 1 from flight_info
insert into flight_info (id, flight_number, departure, destination, departure_time, arrival_time, duration_minutes, meal_count, meal_times, selection_deadline, status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{flightNumber}, #{departure}, #{destination}, #{departureTime}, #{arrivalTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{mealCount}, #{mealTimes}, #{selectionDeadline}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
